IT APPEARS TO THE SATIFACTION OF THE COURT THAT THE FILING FEE FOR DEFT. ALFONSO CRAVIOTO FIRST PAPER IN THE ABOVE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN TIMLEY PAID. THEREFORE IT S ORDERED THAT THE ANSWER OF DEFT. ALFONSO CRAVIOT IN THIS MATTER BE STRICKEN.
